name: The EZ Agency
description_short: The EZ Agency is a credit repair consulting firm led by a Board-Certified Credit Consultant that disputes inaccurate items on credit reports through done-for-you services, DIY eBooks, and virtual challenges.
description_long:
The EZ Agency was founded by Lore'al Avery, a Board-Certified Credit Consultant with a degree in Accounting and 5+ years of credit repair training. The company positions itself as a consulting agency specializing in legal credit repair and credit education, with a focus on simplifying traditionally complex processes. Avery developed a proprietary "8 EZ Steps" methodology for credit repair that forms the foundation of the company's service offerings.

The EZ Agency offers three primary service models: done-for-you credit repair services where the team disputes inaccurate or unlawful information directly with credit bureaus on behalf of clients; a DIY eBook titled "8 EZ Steps to REPAIR YOUR CREDIT" for self-directed credit repair; and a virtual "3-Day Credit Repair Challenge" for guided self-service. The company also sells tradelines for purchase. Clients receive individualized plans, access to 24/7 software for tracking dispute progress, and regular status updates. The company claims that in the first 6-9 months of 2025, they removed over $100,000 in bad debt from client reports, positioning clients for over $200,000 in funding and approvals.

The EZ Agency distinguishes itself through its focus on education and accessibility. Rather than positioning credit repair as a black box, the founder emphasizes breaking down complicated credit concepts and making information understandable. The company operates with extended business hours (Mon-Fri 8am-8pm EST, Sat 8am-5pm EST) and maintains a client login portal for real-time file tracking. The emphasis on transparency, customer satisfaction, and the founder's technical background in accounting sets a professional tone. The company notes future expansion plans including credit classes, funding services, and business credit services.

While the website demonstrates professional positioning and clear service offerings, potential clients should note that specific pricing is not disclosed on the public website, detailed case studies are limited, and claims about results (such as the $100,000 debt removal figure) lack supporting documentation. The legitimacy of credit repair outcomes depends on whether disputed items are genuinely inaccurate—not all negative items can be legally removed. As with all credit repair services, results vary significantly based on individual credit profiles and dispute validity.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Board-Certified Credit Consultant founder with accounting degree and 5+ years of specialized training
Three service tiers (done-for-you, DIY eBook, virtual challenge) accommodate different budgets and preferences
24/7 software access for clients to track dispute status and file progress in real-time
Extended customer service hours (weekdays until 8pm EST, weekend availability)
Emphasis on client education and transparency rather than treating credit repair as opaque process
Proprietary 8 EZ Steps methodology claims to have removed $100,000+ in bad debt within 6-9 months
Individualized plans and multiple communication touchpoints with expert team members
cons: Specific pricing for done-for-you services not disclosed on website, requiring direct inquiry
Claims about results ($100,000 debt removal, $200,000+ in funding approvals) lack third-party verification or documented case studies
Tradeline sales offering not detailed—tradeline quality, pricing, and legitimacy unclear from website content
No information on refund policies, money-back guarantees, or liability if disputes are unsuccessful
As with all credit repair services, outcomes depend on whether items are genuinely inaccurate—legally disputable negative information is limited
best_for: Consumers with inaccurate or fraudulent negative items on their credit reports seeking professional dispute assistance
Self-directed individuals wanting educational resources and a structured methodology to dispute errors themselves
People seeking transparency and education alongside credit repair rather than purely transactional service
diagnosis: The EZ Agency is best suited for consumers with documented errors or inaccurate negative items on their credit reports who want professional dispute assistance or educational resources from a credentialed consultant. The main caveat is that credit repair outcomes are limited to genuinely inaccurate, unverifiable, or unlawful items—legitimate negative information cannot be legally removed—and specific pricing, guarantees, and documented results should be requested before committing to paid services.
services: Done-for-you credit repair services with bureau and creditor dispute representation
Deep credit report analysis to identify inaccurate or misleading information
Individualized credit rebuild plans tailored to client profiles
DIY eBook: "8 EZ Steps to REPAIR YOUR CREDIT"
Virtual 3-Day Credit Repair Challenge for guided self-service learning
24/7 software access for tracking disputed items and file status updates
Regular status updates and communications on active disputes
Expert guidance on spending pattern changes and credit rebuilding strategies
Tradeline purchases (details not specified on website)
Client portal login for real-time file monitoring
Consultation and support services via email (info@theezagency.com)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5625 N German Church Rd #2248, Indianapolis, IN 46235
meta_description: Credit repair consulting firm led by Board-Certified Credit Consultant that disputes inaccurate items on credit reports through done-for-you services.
